name: io.github.vaibot-io/mcp-server
description: VAIBot governance circuit breaker for AI agents. Classifies risk, enforces policy, and produces tamper-evident governance receipts for every agent tool call — before a single command executes.

environmentVariables.name: VAIBOT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your VAIBot API key. Staging keys start with vb_stg_, production keys with vb_live_. Get yours at https://vaibot.io/quickstart

environmentVariables.name: VAIBOT_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: VAIBot API base URL. Defaults to https://api.vaibot.io if not set.
